post.content: Given a size n, two numbers low and high. We have to find out how many ways in which we can construct an array of that size such that low<=a[i]<=high and the sum of the array is divisible by 3.
It\'s a counting problem, you can have a combination reminders as (0, 0, 0) - 1 way or (0,1,2) - 3! ways , so just multiple their counts & add to their contribution.
